zh.lifeSummary: 當Ellen MacCarthy Reagh於大約1473年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 吉爾達卡布瑞時，她的父親Cormac Na Haoine McCarthy Reagh 13th Prince of Carbery-36歲，母親Julia MacCarthy-32歲。她於大約1545年與James barry roe viscount Buttevant Barry 4th Viscount Buttevant 17th Baron Barry在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克拉斯賀巴瑞結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1585年在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克科克享年113歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克德洛姆達萊亞德利莫利阿。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ellen MacCarthy Reagh于大约1473年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 吉爾達卡布瑞时，她的父亲Cormac Na Haoine McCarthy Reagh 13th Prince of Carbery-36岁，母亲Julia MacCarthy-32岁。她于大约1545年与James barry roe viscount Buttevant Barry 4th Viscount Buttevant 17th Baron Barry在爱尔兰庫迪 科克拉斯賀巴瑞结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1585年在爱尔兰庫迪 科克科克享年113岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 科克德洛姆達萊亞德利莫利阿。

nameMeanings.name: MacCarthy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McCarthy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Liam, Cormac, Niall, Aileen, Brigid, Conor, Declan, Dermod, Dermot, Finbar.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cárthaigh ‘son of Cárthach’, a personal name meaning ‘loving’. This was the name of a ruling family in Munster. In Ireland major branches were distinguished by the following epithets: mór ‘great’ in Kerry, riabhach ‘brindled’ in Carbery, west Cork.

nameMeanings.name: Reagh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Ute.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Riabhach, which MacLysaght describes as an adjectival surname (meaning ‘gray’ or ‘brindled’) that ‘took the place of an hereditary one’.
Possibly an altered form of German   Rech  .

variants.name: Rech
meanings: from an ancient Germanic personal name, Recho, a short form of a personal name composed with rāhha ‘revenge’.

nameMeanings.name: Ellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.description: Henry VIII dies, succeeded by the boy king Edward VI. England and Ireland were ruled by the senior nobility of England.

en.lifeSummary: When Ellen MacCarthy Reagh was born about 1473, in Carbury, County Kildare, Ireland, her father, Cormac Na Haoine McCarthy Reagh 13th Prince of Carbery, was -36 and her mother, Julia MacCarthy, was -32. She married James barry roe viscount Buttevant Barry 4th Viscount Buttevant 17th Baron Barry about 1545, in Rathbarry, County Cork, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1585, in Cork, County Cork, Ireland, at the age of 113, and was buried in Drimoleague, Dromdaleague, County Cork, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ellen MacCarthy Reagh est née environ 1473, à Carbury, County Kildare, Irlande, son père, Cormac Na Haoine McCarthy Reagh 13th Prince of Carbery, avait -36 ans et sa mère, Julia MacCarthy, avait -32 ans. Elle a épousé James barry roe viscount Buttevant Barry 4th Viscount Buttevant 17th Baron Barry environ 1545, à Rathbarry, County Cork, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1585, à Cork, County Cork, Irlande, à l’âge de 113 ans, et a été enterrée à Drimoleague, Dromdaleague, County Cork, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ellen MacCarthy Reagh um 1473 in Carbury, County Kildare, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Cormac Na Haoine McCarthy Reagh 13th Prince of Carbery -36 und ihre Mutter Julia MacCarthy -32. Sie hat um 1545 in Rathbarry, County Cork, Irland James barry roe viscount Buttevant Barry 4th Viscount Buttevant 17th Baron Barry geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1585 im Alter von 113 Jahren in Cork, County Cork, Irland und wurde in Drimoleague, Dromdaleague, County Cork, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ellen MacCarthy Reagh è nata il circa 1473 nel Carbury, County Kildare, Irlanda, sua padre, Cormac Na Haoine McCarthy Reagh 13th Prince of Carbery, aveva -36 anni e sua madre, Julia MacCarthy, aveva -32 anni. Lei sposato James barry roe viscount Buttevant Barry 4th Viscount Buttevant 17th Baron Barry circa 1545, nel Rathbarry, County Cork, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1585, nel Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, all'età di 113 anni, e fu sepolta a Drimoleague, Dromdaleague, County Cork, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Ellen MacCarthy Reaghが約1473年にアイルランドコウントイ キルダアカーブリーで生まれた時，父Cormac Na Haoine McCarthy Reagh 13th Prince of Carberyは-36歳，母Julia MacCarthyは-32歳であった。約1545年にアイルランドコウントイ コルクラスバーリーでJames barry roe viscount Buttevant Barry 4th Viscount Buttevant 17th Baron Barryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1585年にアイルランドコウントイ コルクコルクで113歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ コルクドロムダレアグードリモレアグーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ellen MacCarthy Reagh(이)가 대략 1473년 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르 카버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Cormac Na Haoine McCarthy Reagh 13th Prince of Carbery(은)는 -36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Julia MacCarthy(은)는 -32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1545년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 래스바리에서 James barry roe viscount Buttevant Barry 4th Viscount Buttevant 17th Baron Barry(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1585년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 코르크에서 113세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 드롬들리구 드리모리구에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ellen MacCarthy Reagh nasceu aproximadamente 1473, em Carbury, County Kildare, Irlanda, seu pai, Cormac Na Haoine McCarthy Reagh 13th Prince of Carbery, tinha -36 anos e sua mãe, Julia MacCarthy, tinha -32 anos. Ela casou-se com James barry roe viscount Buttevant Barry 4th Viscount Buttevant 17th Baron Barry aproximadamente 1545, em Rathbarry, County Cork, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1585, em Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, com 113 anos, e foi sepultada em Drimoleague, Dromdaleague, County Cork, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ellen MacCarthy Reagh родилась около 1473 г. в местности карбури, коунти каилдар, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Cormac Na Haoine McCarthy Reagh 13th Prince of Carbery было -36 год, а матери, которую звали Julia MacCarthy, -32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James barry roe viscount Buttevant Barry 4th Viscount Buttevant 17th Baron Barry около 1545 г. в местности ратбарри, коунти корк, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1585 г. в местности корк, коунти корк, Ирландия в возрасте 113 лет и была похоронена в местности дримолигу, дромдеилигу, коунти корк, Ирландия.

Se casó con James barry roe viscount Buttevant Barry 4th Viscount Buttevant 17th Baron Barry aproximadamente 1545, en Rathbarry, County Cork, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1585, en Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, a la edad de 113 años, y fue sepultada en Drimoleague, Dromdaleague, County Cork, Irlanda.
